landing.title: Afia Oil Tracker
landing.unknownBottleMessage: This bottle is not registered in our system yet.

camera.positionBottle: Position your bottle in the frame
camera.permissionMessage: Please grant camera permission in your device settings to use this feature.
camera.iosWarning: For best camera experience, open in Safari
camera.iosWarningMessage: Some iOS browsers have camera limitations. Try opening this link in Safari.

analysis.pleaseWait: Please wait while we analyze your photo
analysis.failedMessage: We couldn't analyze your photo. Please try again.
analysis.networkErrorMessage: Please check your internet connection and try again.
analysis.serviceUnavailableMessage: Our AI service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

results.title: Results
results.lowConfidenceMessage: Consider retaking the photo for better accuracy
results.disclaimer: Results are estimates (±15%). Not certified nutritional analysis.
results.blur: Image is too blurry — try holding the phone steady
results.poorLighting: Lighting is poor — try near a window or light
results.obstruction: Bottle is partially obscured — ensure full bottle is visible
results.reflection: Strong reflection detected — try a different angle

feedback.title: Was this estimate accurate?
feedback.improvementMessage: Your input helps improve future estimates.
feedback.error: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
feedback.employeeOnly: Feedback is only collected from internal testers and employees

privacy.message: Before you begin, please note: Scan images are stored anonymously to improve our AI model. No personal information is collected.
privacy.learnMore: Learn more about how we use your data

offline.title: No Internet Connection
offline.message: Network required for scanning. Please check your connection and try again.

login.title: Admin Access
login.subtitle: Enter admin password to continue
login.errorNotConfigured: Admin access not configured. Set VITE_ADMIN_PASSWORD env variable.

recentScans.title: Recent Scans
recentScans.emptyDescription: Scanned bottles will appear here once users start scanning.

export.title: Export Scan Data
export.description: Download your scan history in CSV or JSON format
export.noScansError: No scans to export for the selected date range.

details.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this bottle?

qrGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
qrGenerator.description: Generate QR codes for registered bottles

step1.title: Welcome to Test Lab!
step1.content: This simulates the EXACT user scanning experience with optional debug tools for validation.

step2.title: Choose Your Entry Point
step2.content: Scan Mock QR codes or select bottles from dropdown - both lead to the same user flow.

step3.title: Exact User Experience
step3.content: This is IDENTICAL to the user camera experience - same framing, same guidance, same results.

step4.title: Admin Debug Tools
step4.content: Expand this panel to see API responses, validate results, and add test notes.

validation.title: Validation
validation.question: Was this result accurate?
validation.notesPlaceholder: Lighting was poor, bottle had condensation...

history.title: Scan History
history.emptyMessage: Start scanning bottles to see your history here

trends.title: Consumption Trends
trends.emptyMessage: Scan more bottles to see your consumption trends

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.camera: Camera error. Please refresh and try again.
errors.analysis: Analysis failed. Please retake the photo.
errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection.
